title: nf-core/prs pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.fraser_samplesheet

SampleName.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

FileBaseName.errorMessage: FileBaseName must be provided (e.g. when filename is 'samplex.bam' basename is: 'samplex')

Treatment.errorMessage: Treatment must be provided. If not required fill in 'control'

Set.errorMessage: Set must be provided. If not required fill in 'Set1'
